customDays.title: Custom Days
customDays.description: Number of trailing days, only when timeWindow = CUSTOM_DAYS. Must be a positive integer. Example: "last 60 days" -> 60.

recordId.title: Record Id
recordId.description: Salesforce Id of the matched Doctor (Person Account) or Facility (Business Account). Resolve this via Query Records first; do not invent or guess.

runningUserId.title: Running User Id
runningUserId.description: Optional. User Id whose history to summarize. Employee Agent: leave blank — Apex falls back to the running user automatically. Service Agent (WhatsApp): MUST pass the verifiedUserId resolved during the WhatsApp authorization flow, otherwise it will incorrectly default to the Site Guest User.

timeWindow.title: Time Window
timeWindow.description: LAST_7_DAYS | LAST_30_DAYS | LAST_MONTH | THIS_QUARTER | THIS_YEAR | ALL_TIME | CUSTOM_DAYS. Default THIS_YEAR if blank. Pick based on user phrasing: "recent/this month" -> LAST_30_DAYS, "this week/yesterday/today" -> LAST_7_DAYS, "summary/recap/overview" -> THIS_YEAR, "all/everything/full/total" -> ALL_TIME, "last X days" -> CUSTOM_DAYS with customDays set.
